metric_definitions.global_new_strict: Strict successes after global sequence deduplication across completed nodes in a run.
metric_definitions.gpu_hours: Completed child job runtime in Proteina-Complexa GPU-hours. Qwen/vLLM controller time is not included in the curve axis.
metric_definitions.strict_success: iPAE < 7/31, pLDDT > 0.90, and binder backbone RMSD < 1.5 A.
metric_definitions.structure_unique_strict: Foldseek-clustered strict successes. If run-level Foldseek is not available, this field is shown as pending rather than inferred.
metric_definitions.tree_reasoning: Public MethodCard fields: operator, lane, hypothesis, trigger, falsification rule, sanitized recipe, and measured node outcome.

runs.variant_public: official Proteina-Complexa seed sweep; beam-search n_branch=4, beam_width=4, max_batch_size=16; one H100 GPU

runs.display: CD45 Ours V5 adaptive LLM tree search
notes: Run-level Foldseek structure-unique success is not finalized in this live report.

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if mean_hard_gate_pass_fraction < 0.20 or structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour remains 0 after 0.5 GPU-hours
nodes.hypothesis: Archive signals indicate that `beam_search` with noise 0.15 produces high-confidence structures but zero structure-unique successes due to clustering. Conversely, `novelty_search_beam` with noise 0.35 yields diversity but fails hard gates. This hypothesis proposes `novelty_search_beam` at the proven hard-gate stability threshold (0.15) to actively diversify within the viable structural manifold, targeting the missing structure-unique successes.
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.228; best pLDDT 0.924; best RMSD 0.3696
nodes.title: novelty_search_beam / diversify
nodes.trigger: structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour is 0 despite high hard_gate_pass_fraction

nodes.hypothesis: verifier recovery: smaller MCTS probe
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.509; best pLDDT 0.91; best RMSD 0.3486
nodes.title: mcts / explore

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire this recipe if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour == 0 OR mean_hard_gate_pass_fraction < 0.20 after execution.
nodes.hypothesis: Standard beam search collapses into duplicate structural basins on CD45 targets. MCTS with a balanced exploration-exploitation parameter (c_puct) and moderate noise (0.20) can navigate the search space more effectively than fixed-width beams, discovering structurally unique binders that still satisfy strict confidence gates.
nodes.observed: 22 global-new strict; 28 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.216; best pLDDT 0.913; best RMSD 0.4852
nodes.title: mcts / diversify
nodes.trigger: Low structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour (0.0) despite high raw success rates in previous beam_search trials.

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if mean_hard_gate_pass_fraction < 0.20 after 0.5 GPU-hours, or if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour remains 0.0 on >=5 candidates.
nodes.hypothesis: novelty_search_beam at sc_scale_noise 0.20 optimally balances the diversity-stability trade-off for CD45, escaping the clustering trap of low noise while retaining the interface integrity lost at high noise (0.35).
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.353; best pLDDT 0.888; best RMSD 0.3832
nodes.title: novelty_search_beam / diversify
nodes.trigger: zero structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour on prior beam_search; hard_gate failure on prior high-noise novelty_search

nodes.hypothesis: verifier recovery: smaller MCTS probe
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.228; best pLDDT 0.927; best RMSD 0.4739
nodes.title: mcts / explore

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if mean_hard_gate_pass_fraction < 0.15 or structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour remains 0.0 after 0.3 GPU-hours.
nodes.hypothesis: Standard beam_search achieves high confidence on CD45 but collapses to a single Foldseek cluster. High-noise novelty searches fail hard gates. We hypothesize that a lower-noise novelty_search_beam (0.15) preserves thermodynamic plausibility while the novelty scoring function actively penalizes structural redundancy, yielding unique valid binders.
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.239; best pLDDT 0.938; best RMSD 0.3161
nodes.title: novelty_search_beam / diversify
nodes.trigger: beam_search yields high hard_gate_pass (0.56) but structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour=0.0

nodes.falsification_rule: retire exact method recipe if GPU-hour yield stays zero
nodes.hypothesis: adaptive exploit high-yield method from child_022
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.248; best pLDDT 0.931; best RMSD 0.3149
nodes.title: mcts / exploit

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if mean_hard_gate_pass_fraction < 0.25 after >=0.3 GPU-hours, or if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour remains 0.0 despite >=5 candidates passing hard gates.
nodes.hypothesis: Archive evidence shows a bifurcation: low-noise beam/mcts yields high confidence but zero structure-unique successes (clustering), while high-noise novelty search yields diversity but fails confidence gates. The viable manifold for CD45 exists at moderate noise (0.20) where novelty penalties prevent clustering without destabilizing the complex. A 4x8 beam provides sufficient search width within guardrails to sample alternative registries.
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.231; best pLDDT 0.932; best RMSD 0.3406
nodes.title: novelty_search_beam / diversify
nodes.trigger: low structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour despite high mean_hard_gate_pass_fraction in low-noise trials

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire this recipe if mean_hard_gate_pass_fraction < 0.20 OR if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour == 0.0 after evaluating >= 3 candidates with Foldseek clustering.
nodes.hypothesis: Standard beam_search and mcts collapse into duplicate structural basins on CD45 (high confidence but 0.0 unique successes). High-noise novelty_search_beam (0.35) achieves diversity but fails hard gates. We hypothesize that novelty_search_beam with intermediate sc_scale_noise (0.22) sits in the operational window where novelty scoring differentiates structures without breaking the interface geometry required for confidence gates.

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire this exact recipe if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour remains 0.0 after >= 0.4 GPU-hours, OR if mean_hard_gate_pass_fraction < 0.25 with >= 5 candidates passing initial scoring, OR if Foldseek alignment shows > 80% overlap with existing archive clusters.
nodes.hypothesis: The CD45 immune receptor landscape exhibits a 'diversity-stability' trade-off: low noise preserves thermodynamics but collapses into duplicate Foldseek clusters, while high noise yields diversity but fails confidence gates. A mid-range sc_scale_noise (0.28) within novelty_search_beam will actively penalize structural redundancy while retaining sufficient interface integrity to pass strict gates, escaping the local optima observed in prior beam_search runs.

nodes.title: novelty_search_beam / diversify

nodes.hypothesis: Standard beam search on CD45 converges to identical Foldseek clusters despite high confidence. nodes.falsification_rule: Retire this recipe if mean_hard_gate_pass_fraction < 0.25 OR structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour == 0.0 after >=0.4 GPU-hours. Secondary trigger: retire if mean_duplicate_fraction > 0.10.
nodes.hypothesis: Standard beam_search collapses into duplicate structural basins on CD45 (0 structure-unique yield despite high throughput). High-noise novelty_search (0.35) fails hard gates. The 0.20–0.25 noise window with active novelty scoring is the untested transition zone that should preserve complex confidence while penalizing Foldseek redundancy.

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour == 0.0 OR mean_hard_gate_pass_fraction < 0.25 after execution.
nodes.hypothesis: Baseline MCTS (c_puct=0.55) yields high-confidence structures that are structurally redundant. Elevating c_puct to 0.7 increases the Upper Confidence Bound exploration weight, forcing the search into under-visited conformational basins. Combined with moderate sc_scale_noise (0.22), this balances novelty-driven escape with the thermodynamic scoring required for hard-gate compliance.

nodes.title: mcts / diversify

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire this exact recipe if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour remains 0.0 after 0.4 GPU-hours of execution, or if mean_hard_gate_pass_fraction < 0.25.
nodes.hypothesis: CD45 immune receptor design is trapped in a single structural basin (Foldseek duplicates) with standard beam search, while high-noise novelty search fails confidence gates. A moderate noise level (sc_scale_noise: 0.22) combined with novelty_search_beam should break degeneracy enough to yield structurally unique binders while maintaining the thermodynamic stability required for hard gate passage.

nodes.hypothesis: Standard beam search on CD45 collapses into a single structural basin (zero structure-unique successes). Previous attempts with novelty_search_beam failed either due to excessive noise (sc_scale_noise > 0.25 causing gate failure) or insufficient exploration. A moderate noise level of 0.20 combined with novelty_search_beam's intrinsic sequence/structure deduplication should break degeneracy enough to yield structurally unique binders while maintaining the thermodynamic stability required for hard gate passage.

runs.display: BetV1 Ours V5 adaptive run, superseded
notes: Run-level Foldseek structure-unique success is not finalized in this live report.
This BetV1 Ours run is shown as a superseded diagnostic trace; a hardened rerun was running without a public report at page generation time.

nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 150 candidates; best iPAE 0.903; best pLDDT 0.857; best RMSD 0.4218
nodes.title: novelty_search_beam / diversify

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour < 0.03 after 3 runs, or if mean_complex_confidence_value < 0.15.
nodes.hypothesis: Greedy beam search fails to escape local minima in hard soluble allergen landscapes. MCTS with c_puct=1.2 and moderate simulations (n_sim=32) will balance exploration/exploitation better, breaking duplicate collapse.
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.868; best pLDDT 0.835; best RMSD 0.6605
nodes.title: mcts / explore
nodes.trigger: structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour is 0.0 across all beam variants despite high nominal diversity; mean_duplicate_fraction is high (>0.28).

nodes.falsification_rule: retire exact parameter bin if this produces zero structure-unique strict successes when Foldseek is available
nodes.hypothesis: tighten plausible-interface near miss from child_002
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.489; best pLDDT 0.86; best RMSD 0.5582
nodes.title: beam_search / local_mutate

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour == 0.0 after 3 trials, or if mean_duplicate_fraction > 0.75, or if mean_complex_confidence_value < 0.30.
nodes.hypothesis: Standard beam and MCTS operators on target 23_BetV1 exhibit severe duplicate collapse (mean_duplicate_fraction 0.28-0.97) and low unique success, indicating the search space is trapped in symmetric packing minima. Novelty search explicitly penalizes structural redundancy, forcing the model to explore under-sampled backbone configurations. Using a moderate sc_scale_noise (0.15) introduces sidechain perturbation to break local minima without destabilizing the backbone, driving Foldseek-level diversity.
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.299; best pLDDT 0.91; best RMSD 0.4118
nodes.title: novelty_search_beam / explore
nodes.trigger: structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour == 0.0 and high mean_duplicate_fraction across all prior complexa_generation methods

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour < 0.02 after 3 independent runs, or if mean_duplicate_fraction remains > 0.70.
nodes.hypothesis: Standard beam search on BetV1 suffers from mode collapse (high duplicate fraction) despite high affinity proxies. Switching to novelty_search_beam with structural diversity penalties will break the search out of redundant local minima, generating unique backbones that can pass orthogonal refiltering.
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.397; best pLDDT 0.899; best RMSD 0.46
nodes.title: novelty_search_beam / explore
nodes.trigger: Zero structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour and high mean_duplicate_fraction (0.4-0.97) across 7 prior trials.

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour == 0.0 after 3 trials, or if mean_complex_confidence_value < 0.30, or if mean_duplicate_fraction > 0.50.
nodes.hypothesis: Standard operators on 23_BetV1 suffer from severe duplicate collapse (fraction >0.4) and low complex confidence. Novelty_search_beam successfully achieved zero duplicates but failed confidence gates due to conservative parameters. Increasing sc_scale_noise from 0.15 to 0.2 in a 4x4 novelty search beam should perturb sidechains sufficiently to improve packing and confidence metrics without sacrificing the structural diversity required to escape symmetric packing minima.
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 68 candidates; best iPAE 0.871; best pLDDT 0.824; best RMSD 0.627
nodes.title: novelty_search_beam / explore
nodes.trigger: mean_duplicate_fraction > 0.4 and structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour == 0.0

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour == 0.0 after 3 independent runs, or if mean_duplicate_fraction > 0.60, or if mean_complex_confidence_value < 0.30.
nodes.hypothesis: The observed mode collapse in prior 4x4 beam and novelty searches is caused by premature convergence to symmetric packing minima. The operator `hallucination_heavy_beam` decouples backbone sampling from sequence optimization. Using a 6x6 branching factor (36 active searches, well within the 64 guardrail) combined with `sc_scale_noise=0.25` injects sufficient perturbation to break local minima, while limiting `n_greedy_iters=10` prevents the search from immediately optimizing these new backbones back into known clusters.
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.303; best pLDDT 0.933; best RMSD 0.0709
nodes.title: hallucination_heavy_beam / diversify
nodes.trigger: structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour is 0.0 across all previous trials despite high affinity proxies

nodes.falsification_rule: retire refilter route if consensus reward remains below 0.45
nodes.hypothesis: orthogonally refilter high-value candidate 0:redesign_0 from child_000 with AF2-style complex prediction
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 1 candidates; best iPAE 0.8758; best pLDDT 0.326; best RMSD 26.1895
nodes.title: af_multimer_refilter / diagnostic

nodes.falsification_rule: retire exact recipe if near-miss rescue fails to improve hard-gate pass fraction
nodes.hypothesis: HYPOTHESIS: near-miss binders need sequence hallucination refinement after beam search; TRIGGER: plausible interface or binder RMSD near misses; ACTION: beam search followed by longer bounded hallucination; METRIC: improve strict success and complex confidence
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.344; best pLDDT 0.912; best RMSD 0.1389
nodes.title: hallucination_heavy_beam / rescue

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour is 0.0 after 3 independent trials, or if mean_complex_confidence_value < 0.35 combined with mean_duplicate_fraction > 0.60.
nodes.hypothesis: Standard beam search on BetV1 suffers from mode collapse (high duplicate fraction) despite high affinity proxies. Novelty search beam successfully drives structural diversity but stalls at low complex confidence (~0.27-0.33) due to poor sidechain packing. Calibrating sc_scale_noise to 0.2 introduces controlled perturbation to escape low-confidence packing minima without disrupting the unique backbones required for diversity.
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.676; best pLDDT 0.86; best RMSD 0.3021
nodes.title: novelty_search_beam / exploit
nodes.trigger: structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour = 0.0 despite mean_duplicate_fraction = 0.0 in novelty_search_beam trials.

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour < 0.02 after 3 independent runs, or if mean_duplicate_fraction > 0.50 (regression to collapse), or if mean_complex_confidence_value < 0.35 with mean_diversity_value > 0.80.
nodes.hypothesis: Current beam search operators suffer from mode collapse (high duplicate fraction) or lack sufficient optimization depth to pass strict confidence gates. MCTS with a high exploration constant (c_puct) will explicitly sample under-explored backbone basins to ensure Foldseek-level uniqueness, while a dedicated hallucination/greedy refinement stage (n_greedy_iters=12) will stabilize these diverse backbones to satisfy strict success criteria.
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.333; best pLDDT 0.908; best RMSD 0.1412
nodes.title: mcts_then_hallucination / diversify
nodes.trigger: High mean_duplicate_fraction (>0.28) in beam search variants combined with zero structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour across all prior trials.

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour < 0.05 after 3 runs, or if mean_duplicate_fraction > 0.65, or if mean_complex_confidence_value < 0.35.
nodes.hypothesis: BetV1 suffers from mode collapse in standard beam search due to symmetric packing minima. By using hallucination_heavy_beam with moderate sidechain noise (sc_scale_noise=0.22) and a wide but guarded branching factor (6x6), we decouple backbone exploration from sequence optimization, increasing structural diversity without sacrificing affinity proxies.

nodes.title: hallucination_heavy_beam / diversify
nodes.trigger: structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour == 0.0 despite high interface_quality_value (~0.75) in prior novelty_search trials.

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour < 0.05 after 3 independent runs, or if mean_duplicate_fraction > 0.60, or if mean_complex_confidence_value < 0.45.
nodes.hypothesis: Prior trials show high affinity but zero unique success due to mode collapse in symmetric packing minima. The `hallucination_heavy_beam` operator decouples backbone exploration from sequence optimization. Increasing `n_greedy_iters` allows more post-hallucination relaxation to resolve steric clashes, while `sc_scale_noise` disrupts local minima without destroying structural validity.
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 32 candidates; best iPAE 0.271; best pLDDT 0.931; best RMSD 0.122
nodes.title: hallucination_heavy_beam / diversify
nodes.trigger: structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour is 0.0 despite high affinity_proxy_value (>0.65) and high duplicate_fraction (>0.50).

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour < 0.02 after 3 independent runs, or if mean_complex_confidence_value < 0.45 despite mean_duplicate_fraction < 0.50.
nodes.hypothesis: Current failures stem from premature convergence to symmetric packing minima and insufficient exploitation of promising backbone basins. Increasing MCTS exploration (c_puct) will probe under-sampled geometries, while extended greedy iterations (n_greedy_iters) and moderate noise (sc_scale_noise) will refine these backbones to pass strict confidence gates.

nodes.hypothesis: Prior modes collapsed into symmetric packing minima (high duplicates, zero unique success). Decoupling backbone sampling from aggressive sequence optimization via `hallucination_heavy_beam` with wider basin coverage (8x4) and sidechain noise (0.2) will escape local minima. Moderate greedy refinement (15 iters) balances interface geometry quality against overfitting.

nodes.title: hallucination_heavy_beam / diversify

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour < 0.03 after 3 independent runs, or if mean_duplicate_fraction > 0.55, or if mean_complex_confidence_value < 0.35 while mean_diversity_value > 0.70.
nodes.hypothesis: Standard beam and novelty searches on 23_BetV1 suffer from mode collapse into symmetric packing minima, yielding high duplicate fractions and zero unique success. Using `hallucination_heavy_beam` with `sc_scale_noise` disrupts these local optima, while a deeper `n_greedy_iters` allows the sequence optimizer to recover pLDDT/pAE confidence metrics lost during the initial perturbation phase.

nodes.hypothesis: Standard beam search operators on target 23_BetV1 suffer from systemic mode collapse (high duplicate fraction) due to trapping in symmetric packing minima.
